preview.tournamentOverview: Aronimink Golf Club hosts the PGA Championship with a layout that places a premium on approach play and total strokes gained. The course demands precision iron play and consistent ball-striking over raw distance. This major carries extra weight as a key measuring stick for the season and a critical opportunity for players to claim a career-defining title.
preview.modelExplainer: SG Approach (30.7%) leads the model, followed by SG Total (22.8%) and SG Off-the-Tee (16.2%). Approach play and overall ball-striking carry the heaviest influence, while putting (8.3%) and bogey avoidance (3.0%) receive lighter weight. The model prioritizes players who gain strokes on approach and total performance at Aronimink.
preview.pickApproach: Top-tier bets target players ranked 1-5 who excel in the heavily weighted approach and total strokes categories. Mid-tier wagers focus on 6-12 where SG App and SG Total remain strong relative to field. Lower-tier options include 13-20 for value when SG App or SG Total grades exceed their tournament rank.
